name: GitHub
description: Makes your agent fluent in GitHub operations: creating and reviewing pull requests, managing issues, commenting on PRs, and interacting with repositories via the GitHub CLI (`gh`). Requires `gh` CLI to be installed and a valid GitHub personal access token.
brief: You can use the GitHub CLI (`gh`) to manage PRs, issues, and repos. Load this skill with `use_skill('github')`.
author: Evonic
